# Links Test Document

## Local markdown links

Read the [basic test](basic.md) for simple examples.

## External URLs

Visit [GitHub](https://github.com) for open source code.

Check [this markdown file](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mdink-rs/mdink/main/README.md) online.

Here is [link one](basic.md), [link two](code-blocks.md), and [link three](https://example.com).

## Empty link text

[](basic.md) should not appear as a navigable link.
